title: GraspSearchRequest
description: BFF -> grasp-search service input. Wire form uses camelCase.

contractVersion.description: Internal contract version (see contract-version.json). Mismatch is rejected with 400.

layoutVersion.description: Layout DSL schema version this declaration targets, e.g. 'layout/1.0'. References the public schema; not redefined here.

graspSearchDeclaration.description: The graspSearch declaration. Its detailed shape (hardConstraints / objectives) is owned by the Layout DSL schema named by layoutVersion; kept open here on purpose.

objectiveWeights.description: objective name -> weight. Keys correspond to score breakdown keys.

topN.description: How many ranked candidates to return (fallback material for the BFF).
